overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game depicting a character in a red cloak walking through a medieval Viking village. The character moves from a covered wooden corridor through a snowy exterior with traditional wooden buildings and a large stone statue.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered wooden corridor, passing by cooking fires and storage barrels

entered.detail: tall vertical wooden log walls forming the left side of the corridor
tall vertical wooden log walls forming the right side of the corridor
overhead wooden beam structure with gaps allowing light to filter through
packed dirt and wooden plank ground surface
burning fire pit with orange flames on a metal stand
round wooden storage barrels stacked near the wall
clay pottery hanging from wooden beams on the right side

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow covered wooden corridor with log walls and a beam roof. The ground is dirt with scattered debris, and various medieval props like fire braziers, barrels, and hanging clay pots line the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden stairway leading to corridor exit

events.description: begins ascending wooden stairs, changing from flat walking to climbing
approaching the bright exit opening, light intensity increases significantly

agents.ego_description: climbing wooden stairs toward the corridor exit, with increasing daylight visible ahead

entered.detail: steep wooden plank stairs leading upward toward the exit
large white canvas sacks piled against the right wall
bright orange fabric visible through gaps in the wall structure

segments.scene_description: The character climbs wooden stairs within the corridor, passing sacks of goods stored along the walls. Bright daylight becomes visible at the top of the stairs, indicating the approach to the exterior.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snowy village square with stone statue

events.description: exits the covered wooden corridor into the bright open snowy exterior
ground surface transitions from wooden planks to deep snow

agents.ego_description: walking through the snowy village exterior, approaching and passing a large stone statue while observing the wooden buildings

notable_agents.action: villagers walking near distant wooden buildings on the hillside

entered.detail: deep white snow covering the ground with visible footprints
woven wooden stick fences lining the path on both sides
tall monolithic stone figure of a robed human standing on a pedestal
traditional Viking-style wooden longhouse with carved roof decorations
large tree with orange and yellow autumn leaves

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a bright open snowy village with traditional wooden longhouses and a prominent stone statue. The ground is covered in deep snow, and villagers can be seen in the distance near the buildings on the rocky hillside.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the dim interior of a rustic wooden corridor into the expansive, bright light of a snowy Viking village. It begins by trailing a character through a narrow passage of log walls and beam roofs, passing fire braziers, barrels, and hanging clay pots scattered across a dirt floor. As the character ascends a set of wooden stairs lined with sacks of goods, the dim interior light gradually gives way to a brilliant glow at the top of the climb. The scene then opens completely as the character emerges from the corridor into a wide, snow-covered landscape featuring traditional wooden longhouses and a prominent stone statue. Finally, the view expands across the deep snow toward distant villagers gathered near buildings on a rocky hillside under the bright daylight.
